name: The Chemours Company
name_former: E. I. du Pont de Nemours and Company (Performance Chemicals division)
description: The Chemours Company is a leading global provider of performance chemicals, operating through three main segments: Titanium Technologies, Thermal & Specialized Solutions, and Advanced Performance Materials. Spun off from DuPont in 2015, the company delivers innovative solutions across a diverse range of industries, including automotive, electronics, aerospace, and telecommunications. Chemours is renowned for its iconic brands such as Teflon, Ti-Pure, Krytox, Freon, and Opteon, focusing on sustainable chemistry and advanced materials to meet modern industrial demands.
